About Projects Recruitment Contact Apply Now
Purdue University Student Organization

Real Projects.
Real Impact.

Project Management at Purdue was founded to cultivate essential project management skills while showcasing the diverse career paths and opportunities available within the field. Members gain real-world experience by leading and collaborating on teams to develop solutions, recommendations, and products for a wide range of companies.

Apply to PMP → Get in Touch
6+
Partner Companies
50+
Active Members
10+
Projects Delivered
About PMP

Why Join Project
Management at Purdue?

PMP bridges the gap between classroom theory and industry practice. As a member, you'll work directly with Fortune 500 companies and local organizations to deliver real consulting projects — building a portfolio that sets you apart before graduation.

Whether you're pursuing a CAPM certification, sharpening your leadership abilities, or exploring project management as a career, PMP gives you the tools, mentors, and hands-on experience to succeed.

📚

Industry Methods & Skills

Work on live projects using the same methodologies, tools, and frameworks that professional project managers use every day.

🎓

Professional Development

Attend speaker events with industry leaders and gain insights into the breadth of careers available in project management.

📋

Professional Certificates

Work toward Google Project Management or CAPM certifications with club resources, study groups, and peer support.

Our Work

Projects & Partners

Snapshots from projects we've delivered and companies we've collaborated with.

DSB City Bus PepsiCo SC Johnson Rolls-Royce
🎫
Client Project

PepsiCo Supply Chain Analysis

Delivered process improvement recommendations to PepsiCo's supply chain team, identifying key bottlenecks and efficiency gains.

🚚
Community Partner

City Bus Route Optimization

Partnered with City Bus to analyze rider data and propose route adjustments that improved coverage and reduced wait times.

✈️
Industry Partner

Rolls-Royce Process Mapping

Collaborated with Rolls-Royce engineers to document and streamline internal project handoff procedures.

🎤
Speaker Event

Industry Speaker Series

Hosted speakers from top companies to share career insights, project management best practices, and industry trends.

🛠️
Client Project

SC Johnson Product Launch

Supported SC Johnson's new product launch with market research, timeline planning, and cross-functional coordination.

🏫
Campus Initiative

DSB Campus Project

Worked with DSB to develop recommendations and deliverables that improved operational workflows on campus.

Join Us

Recruitment

Applications Open

Ready to build real-world experience?

If you're excited about project management and want hands-on experience working with professionals, we'd love for you to apply. Let us know why you're interested and what you hope to learn.
